description_long: This ottoman features a large, square form upholstered in deep blue, likely faux leather, with a prominent diamond-tufted cushion top accented by evenly spaced buttons. The upholstery is smooth and glossy, giving it a luxurious and modern appearance. Along the lower edge, a row of metallic nailhead trim adds a decorative and sophisticated touch. The ottoman stands on four short, turned wooden legs finished in black, providing stability and a classic look. The overall build appears plush and inviting, with a soft, padded surface suitable for sitting or resting items. Its bold color and elegant details make it a striking piece for urban interiors or stylish public spaces.
description: A large, blue, diamond-tufted ottoman with glossy faux leather upholstery, nailhead trim, and turned black legs. The design is plush, modern, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the diamond-tufted cushion, nailhead trim, and two turned legs.
description_view_1: Side view nearly identical to the front, highlighting the symmetry and consistent tufting pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view with the same tufted cushion and trim, showing the ottoman's uniform design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other sides with visible tufting, trim, and legs.
